iotfleetwise.campaign.collectionscheme.C: Specifies what data to collect and how often or when to collect it.

iotfleetwise.campaign.collectionscheme.C.Description: (Optional) Information about a collection scheme that uses a simple logical expression to recognize what data to collect.

iotfleetwise.campaign.collectionscheme.T.Description: (Optional) Information about a collection scheme that uses a time period to decide how often to collect data.
